note: Surface-completeness triage for Morpho Blue. EVERY external-mutating selector in the snapshot MUST appear here with an explicit cover|exclude decision (gate invariant I1). 'cover' selectors MUST have a manifest (I2); the contract's manifests MUST all be 'cover' here (I3). This file is the §3 triage table as machine-checked data — it converts research-completeness from prose to a build gate.

0xa99aad89.name: supply
0xa99aad89.reason: user position: supply loan assets (lend) on behalf of an account

0x50d8cd4b.name: borrow
0x50d8cd4b.reason: user position: borrow assets against own collateral

0x238d6579.name: supplyCollateral
0x238d6579.reason: user position: supply collateral to own position

0xeecea000.name: setAuthorization
0xeecea000.reason: PERMISSION DELEGATION primitive — grants an operator full control of the caller's Morpho positions. Dambi's raison d'être; never exclude (permission-primitive red-flag, manual §3).

0x8069218f.name: setAuthorizationWithSig
0x8069218f.reason: relayer submission path — submits an ALREADY-SIGNED Authorization on behalf of the signer. The authorizer's risk is captured at off-chain sign time (signed_structs.Authorization / authorization-sign manifest), NOT at on-chain submission; the submitter is a third-party relayer, not the position owner. Future-cover candidate if self-submit calldata analysis is wanted (semantics duplicate the off-chain path).

0xd8eabcb8.name: liquidate
0xd8eabcb8.reason: keeper — caller is the liquidator seizing an unhealthy position, not the position owner. Same policy as Aave liquidationCall / HL finalizer.

0xe0232b42.name: flashLoan
0xe0232b42.reason: keeper/integrator — atomic flash loan, not a standing wallet-position action.

0x151c1ade.name: accrueInterest
0x151c1ade.reason: infra — permissionless interest accrual on a market; moves no caller funds and grants no permission.

0x8c1358a2.name: createMarket
0x8c1358a2.reason: infra — permissionless market creation (protocol setup), not a wallet-position action.

Authorization.reason: off-chain EIP-712 message the user SIGNS to grant an operator full control of their positions (authorization-sign manifest, sentinel selector 0x00000001; later relayed via setAuthorizationWithSig). The most dangerous off-chain grant — Dambi's core target.
